key.query: The Whistler Bodega Cask Single Malt Irish Whiskey official

emittedEvidence.query: The Whistler Bodega Cask Single Malt Irish Whiskey official
emittedEvidence.summary:
The official producer appears to be **Boann Distillery**, which owns **The Whistler** brand. I could not find an obvious current official product page for **“The Whistler Bodega Cask Single Malt Irish Whiskey”** itself, but an independent review and Boann materials support the key identity details.

What the sources support:

- **Bottle/release name:** *The Whistler Bodega Cask Irish Single Malt* is documented by an independent review. ([thewhiskeywash.com](https://thewhiskeywash.com/reviews/whiskey-review-the-whistler-bodega-cask-irish-single-malt/?utm_source=openai))
- **Style / category:**
